title: Thanks to all those good and caring people out there
description: GOLF NEWS - Youth for Christ (YFC) Knysna...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - Youth for Christ (YFC) Knysna gives a huge thank you to the companies and communities of Knysna and Plett for their generosity towards its Golf Day.","html":"GOLF NEWS - Youth for Christ (YFC) Knysna gives a huge thank you to the companies and communities of Knysna and Plett for their generosity towards its Golf Day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They received beautiful prizes and the turnout on the day was unexpectedly huge. A company from Wellington sponsored a hole, donated other prizes and even turned up for the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are truly grateful and humbled by the beauty of everyone's kindness and generosity towards YFC,\" writes YFC in a letter.","html":"\"We are truly grateful and humbled by the beauty of everyone's kindness and generosity towards YFC,\" writes YFC in a letter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"A special thank you to our guest speaker, Duran de Villiers, who also donated a breathtakingly stunning picture on canvas as one of the auction items. Thank you again to all of you involved in making this day a successful one for us.","html":"\"A special thank you to our guest speaker, Duran de Villiers, who also donated a breathtakingly stunning picture on canvas as one of the auction items. Thank you again to all of you involved in making this day a successful one for us."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I hope this is a reminder to everyone reading this letter that there are still some very good-hearted people, individuals and companies, out there in the world.\"","html":"\"I hope this is a reminder to everyone reading this letter that there are still some very good-hearted people, individuals and companies, out there in the world.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
